species.name: Pyrolt
species.lore: A Fire starter. Pyrolt's mane sparks when it senses a worthy rival; village smiths once kept them to judge the temperature of a forge by the color of their flame.

species.name: Cindrake
species.lore: The flames along Cindrake's spine harden into ember-scales that flake off as it runs, leaving a glowing trail.

species.name: Vulcanyr
species.lore: Final Fire form. Vulcanyr's iron-fused hide makes it a living blast furnace; trainers who raise one are said to never feel winter.

species.name: Driblet
species.lore: A Water starter that stores seawater in its cheeks and reads tides by taste.

species.name: Marisor
species.lore: Marisor's shell hums a low tone that calms smaller water creatures.

species.name: Leviadon
species.lore: Final Water form. Leviadon sleeps in trenches and surfaces only during storms; sailors call its silhouette 'the moving reef'.

species.name: Sproutle
species.lore: A Grass starter. The bud on its back blooms only once it fully trusts its trainer.

species.name: Bramblux
species.lore: Bramblux weaves living thorn-armor it can shed and regrow within a day.

species.name: Florathar
species.lore: Final Grass form. Florathar's blossom releases spores that sharpen the focus of those nearby, prized by scholars of the Sunken Archive.

species.name: Voltail
species.lore: Voltail outruns its own thunder; pikemen of Stormspire train them to relay signals across the peaks.

species.name: Cryostag
species.lore: Its antlers regrow each winter as living ice; herds migrate across the tundra following the aurora.

species.name: Mirevex
species.lore: Mirevex filters toxins from swamp water, leaving it clean; bog villages consider one a blessing on the well.

species.name: Geargolem
species.lore: An ancient construct that reactivated when miners struck the Obsidian Caldera; it guards something it no longer remembers.

species.name: Umbrahowl
species.lore: Said to be the shadow a hero cast on the night they fell; it hunts only those who break a promise.

species.name: Aetherion
species.lore: A box-legendary built by a lost civilization to think for them. It calculates outcomes before they happen, which is why it rarely needs to fight.

species.name: Tempestus
species.lore: The storm that never lands. Tempestus is the second cover legendary, a rival force of pure motion to Aetherion's pure thought.

species.name: Solmagnar
species.lore: Mythic. Legend says Solmagnar is the first sunrise given a body; it appears once a season at the world's highest point.

species.name: Nyxoria
species.lore: Mythic counterpart to Solmagnar: the first nightfall. The two have never been seen in the same sky.

species.name: Gaiathos
species.lore: Mythic titan whose slow heartbeat sets the rhythm of the seasons. Endgame raid boss with a 3-phase encounter.

species.name: Chronovex
species.lore: The post-game superboss. Chronovex exists slightly out of time; in its raid it acts twice per round and the only way to win is to disrupt the loop it lives in.
